rationale: The definition declares the five primitive connectives as a component of the propositional language (def:propositional-language) AND types each by arity -- negation unary, the rest binary -- with the arity governing the formation pattern (neg-phi vs (phi-circ-psi)). def:arity is therefore load-bearing and was missing.
notes: Follows the batch-0034 precedent of adding def:arity to symbol definitions that specify arities. Borderline (arity could be read as descriptive here), so moderate confidence -> re-run. The connective inventory itself is the language component.
